title: Cinematic Woosh SFX-001.wav
author: AudioPapkin
modifications: Fetched the public hq.mp3 preview from the Freesound CDN. Slightly more cinematic / processed than -1/-2; use sparingly only on the highest-stakes arrows (e.g. money-flow into the big donor reveal). Trim hard to ~300ms — the source is ~5s. Normalize to -26 dB.
